research.title: What NIST should know when updating the SSDF for AI
research.summary: TL;DR overview The Secure Software Development Framework must evolve to address non-deterministic AI code generation, massive agentic code volumes, and new active adversarial attack surfaces. An upcoming SSDF update should mandate automated, independent.

research.title: Oracle Critical Patch Update, June 2026 Security Update Review
research.summary: Oracle released its third quarterly edition of this year’s Critical Patch Update. The update received patches for 245 security vulnerabilities. Some of the vulnerabilities addressed in this update impact more than one product. These patches address.

research.title: Shynet | VERSION 0.13.1
research.summary: The following document describes identified vulnerabilities in the Shynet application version 0.13.1.

vulns.title: Lab khai thác lỗ hổng IDOR trên Saleor GraphQL - query order() không kiểm tra xác thực, lộ toàn bộ PII.

vulns.title: Ubuntu 22.04 + nginx 1.30.0 Docker Runtime
vulns.summary: NGINX Plus and NGINX Open Source have a vulnerability in the ngx_http_rewrite_module module. This vulnerability exists when the rewrite directive is followed by a rewrite, if, or set directive and an unnamed Perl-Compatible.
